tasks.label: Run Uvicorn (Fast)
tasks.command: cd backend && pip install -r requirement.txt && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-delay 2

tasks.label: Run Uvicorn (Production)
tasks.command: cd backend && pip install -r requirement.txt && uvicorn app.main:app --workers 4 --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
